name: Spaghetti Torte
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup ricotta cheese (light, nonfat, or regular)
4 egg whites or 1/2 cup Egg Beaters or, egg substitute
1/4 cup fresh basil, chopped or 2 tsp. dried
4 slices provolone cheese (1 oz. each), cut into fourths
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9x3-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Cook spaghetti according to package directions. Rinse and drain.
4. In a bowl, combine Parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, Italian seasoning, and egg whites (or substitute). Toss with cooked spaghetti until well-coated.
5. Press half the spaghetti mixture into the bottom of the pan. Sprinkle with half the basil.
6. Top layer with half the tomatoes and half the provolone cheese slices.
7. Press remaining spaghetti mixture on top. Sprinkle with remaining basil, and top with remaining tomatoes and provolone cheese.
8. Bake for 30 minutes. Let stand about 15 minutes before removing the side of the pan. Place on a serving platter. Cut into wedges to serve. Serve with spaghetti sauce, if desired.
